name: Dilly Bread
recipeIngredient: Dill seed, 1/2 tbsp (substitute caraway if unavailable)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix dry yeast with warm water and egg until combined.
2. Add salt, sugar, and minced onion to the wet mixture.
3. Gradually incorporate cottage cheese and butter into the wet ingredients.
4. Stir in dill seed (or caraway) and all-purpose flour alternately with the liquid, mixing until a shaggy dough forms.
5. Fold in baking soda.
6. Turn dough onto a floured surface and knead until smooth and elastic.
7. Shape dough into a loaf and place in a greased bread pan.
8. Cover and let rise until doubled in size.
9. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
10. Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until golden brown and hollow-sounding when tapped.
11. Remove from oven and cool on a wire rack.
